meaning: adj.更多的n.更多adv.更,更多,更加,超过,多,大大高于 num.更多
examples: More and more people are using the Internet.
As time went on he grew more and more impatient.
She spends more and more time alone in her room.
New tactical trading plays will evolve quickly, while longer term strategies will evolve more slowly.
Third, the central government is borrowing far more than it contemplated just a few months ago.
